features.description: Server-side capture of UTM + click IDs + referrer + landing page at request boundary. First-touch preserved forever; last-touch updated on every attribution-bearing request. All tiers.
Capture msclkid (Microsoft Bing) + sccid (Snapchat) click IDs in addition to gclid + fbclid. Medium+.
Hourly pre-aggregation of campaign performance metrics + rollup dashboards + GET /api/v1/campaigns/rollup routes. Medium+.
Merge anonymous browser profiles into an identified profile when a subject signs up / logs in from a different device. Enterprise-only.
Bulk import historical attribution data from external CRMs (Salesforce, HubSpot, Segment). Enterprise-only.
Extends touchpoint retention from 730 days (2 years) to 2555 days (7 years) — aligns with financial-record retention. Enterprise-only.
SDUI widget rendering the last N touchpoints for a subject. Embedded in the my-attribution screen + admin drill-downs.
Compliance-team report of AttributionSuppressedByConsent events. Feeds quarterly regulatory review. All tiers (compliance-critical).
